name: health-trend-analyzer
description: 分析一段时间内健康数据的趋势和模式。关联药物、症状、生命体征、化验结果和其他健康指标的变化。识别令人担忧的趋势、改善情况，并提供数据驱动的洞察。当用户询问健康趋势、模式、随时间的变化或"我的健康状况有什么变化？"时使用。支持多维度分析（体重/BMI、症状、药物依从性、化验结果、情绪睡眠），相关性分析，变化检测，以及交互式HTML可视化报告（ECharts图表）。
capabilities: Analyze health data trends over custom time periods
Correlate medications, symptoms, vital signs, lab results, and emotional state
Identify concerning trends, improvements, and data-driven health insights
Generate interactive HTML visualization reports with ECharts
Perform multi-dimensional analysis including weight/BMI, symptoms, medication adherence, lab results, and sleep patterns
Detect correlations and changes between different health metrics
author: huifer
securitySummary: The skill is a documentation and template-based health trend analysis tool. Static findings are false positives: code examples in markdown files were flagged as 'external_commands' but are not executable. This skill does not execute any code, shell commands, or cryptographic operations.
valueStatement: Users struggle to identify patterns in their health data over time. This skill correlates medications, symptoms, vital signs, and lab results to reveal trends and provide actionable health insights through interactive visualizations.
limitations: Does not provide medical diagnosis or treatment recommendations
Cannot access real-time health data without user-provided input
Visualization reports require ECharts library (loaded via CDN)
Analysis quality depends on completeness and accuracy of input data

useCases.title: Track Medication Effectiveness
useCases.description: Patients can analyze how their symptoms change in relation to medication changes, identifying which treatments correlate with symptom improvement.

useCases.title: Identify Health Patterns
useCases.description: Users can discover correlations between lifestyle factors (sleep, mood, activity) and health metrics, enabling proactive health management.

useCases.title: Prepare Health Summaries
useCases.description: Healthcare providers or caregivers can generate trend reports to share with medical professionals during consultations.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Health Trend Query
promptTemplates.prompt: 我的健康状况有什么变化？我想了解过去{时间段}的健康趋势，包括体重、症状、药物使用和情绪睡眠情况。
promptTemplates.scenario: When user asks about general health changes over time

promptTemplates.title: Symptom-Medication Correlation
promptTemplates.prompt: 分析我的症状和药物使用之间的关联。哪些药物变化与症状改善或恶化相关？显示可视化的相关性图表。
promptTemplates.scenario: When user wants to understand medication effectiveness

promptTemplates.title: Comprehensive Health Report
promptTemplates.prompt: 生成一份完整的健康趋势分析报告，包括：1) 体重/BMI变化趋势 2) 症状频率统计 3) 药物依从性分析 4) 化验结果变化 5) 情绪睡眠相关性。输出HTML可视化报告。
promptTemplates.scenario: When user requests comprehensive health analysis

promptTemplates.title: Specific Metric Deep Dive
promptTemplates.prompt: 深入分析{具体指标}的变化趋势，关联其他健康因素，找出可能的影响因素和预警信号。
promptTemplates.scenario: When user wants detailed analysis of a specific health metric

bestPractices: Provide comprehensive health data including dates, measurements, symptoms, and medications for accurate analysis
Use consistent units and time formats across all input data
Generate and review the HTML visualization reports for better pattern recognition
antiPatterns: Asking for medical diagnosis or treatment recommendations instead of trend analysis
Providing incomplete or inconsistent health data that may lead to inaccurate conclusions
Relying solely on automated analysis without consulting healthcare professionals for medical decisions

faq.question: 这个技能可以诊断我的健康问题吗？
faq.answer: 不能。这个技能仅提供数据趋势分析和可视化，帮助用户理解健康数据的变化模式。所有医疗相关决策应在专业医生指导下进行。

faq.question: 我需要提供什么格式的数据？
faq.answer: 技能支持JSON格式的健康数据输入，包括时间戳、生命体征、症状评分、药物记录、化验结果等信息。详见数据源说明文档。

faq.question: 生成的HTML报告如何查看？
faq.answer: 技能会生成包含ECharts图表的HTML文件。在Claude Code环境中可直接打开查看，包含趋势图、相关性热图、时间轴等多种可视化展示。

faq.question: 分析结果有多准确？
faq.answer: 分析质量取决于输入数据的完整性和准确性。技能使用统计方法检测趋势和相关性，但不能替代专业医疗分析。

faq.question: 如何保护我的健康数据隐私？
faq.answer: 所有数据处理在本地AI环境中进行，不会上传到外部服务器。用户应避免在提示中包含过于敏感的个人身份信息。

faq.question: 支持多长时间的跨度分析？
faq.answer: 理论上支持任意时间范围，但数据点越多分析越准确。建议至少提供1个月以上的数据以获得有意义的趋势洞察。
